quality_gates.name: project_frame_ready
quality_gates.goal: project purpose, visible flow, and non-goals are clear
quality_gates.pass_condition: the current project frame is concrete enough to avoid broad solution guessing

quality_gates.name: technical_frame_ready
quality_gates.goal: technical constraints and ownership boundaries are clear
quality_gates.pass_condition: the AI can work without inventing the wrong technical world

quality_gates.name: quality_frame_ready
quality_gates.goal: test split, documentation map, and done criteria are visible
quality_gates.pass_condition: quality expectations are explicit enough for bounded work

quality_gates.name: work_package_ready
quality_gates.goal: the next work package is small, bounded, and reviewable
quality_gates.pass_condition: ChatGPT Codex can execute without broad ambiguity

quality_gates.name: result_accepted
quality_gates.goal: the result fits the frame and is ready for continuation
quality_gates.pass_condition: code, tests, and documentation are aligned and open points are visible

quality_gates.name: next_package_selected
quality_gates.goal: the next small step is selected based on the current result and open points
quality_gates.pass_condition: the next bounded clarification or execution step is explicitly chosen
